body:
- Accordion has an `openMultiple` prop, set to `true` by default
- Toggle group has an `toggleMultiple` prop, set to `false` by default
  - Toggle group exposes `multiple` property in its state interface, which is somewhat inconsistent with the prop
- Select might potentially have a prop to choose from multiple values
  - Might have other breaking change considerations due to value type being an array then. Somewhat related: https://github.com/mui/base-ui/issues/1076

I think we should converge on a single `multiple` prop as that's going to be the most versatile going forward across different components

**Search keywords**:

comments.body:
This fix will be available in the next npm release of Base UI.

In the meantime, you can try it out on our Canary release channel:

```sh
npm i https://pkg.pr.new/@base-ui-components/react@2764
```

labels.description: Introduces changes that are not backward compatible.

title: [accordion][select][toggle group] Decide on a common prop name for multiple active items
